label: fast_pacing_action
description: Motorcycle race at sunset — fast pacing, cinematic style, tracking shot

input.topic: a motorbike racer speeding through mountain roads at sunset

character.name: The Racer
character.wardrobe: full red-and-black racing suit and helmet

world.environment: Rugged mountain cliffs, cracked tarmac, loose gravel

visual_constants.color_palette: amber, burnt orange, blood red, dark asphalt
visual_constants.lighting_rule: Sunset orange floods the scene from ahead with long dramatic shadows
visual_constants.style_lock: Cinematic style, wide-angle lens, fast dynamic motion

audio_constants.ambient_layer: wind rush and tyre roar blending into the open-air soundscape

story_arc: Frame 1 (8s): [launch] — The racer dumps the clutch and aggressively launches the bike, tearing into the first hairpin bend.
Frame 2 (7s): [straight] — The racer tucks low over the tank and blasts down a straight stretch into the blazing sunset.
Frame 3 (7s): [crest] — The racer crests the mountain ridge, launching the front wheel briefly against the sky.

output.topic: a motorbike racer speeding through mountain roads at sunset
output.full_story: A lone motorbike racer aggressively launches onto a winding mountain road, carving a tight bend. Pushing maximum speed down a straight stretch, they race directly into the blazing sunset. The sequence ends as the racer blasts over the final mountain crest, launching the front wheel against the sky.

frames.prompt: Low angle cinematic wide-angle shot of a motorbike racer in a full red-and-black racing suit and helmet launching hard on a narrow winding mountain road at sunset. The racer dumps the clutch and the 1000cc racing motorbike erupts forward, rear tire spraying loose gravel as they accelerate aggressively into the first hairpin bend. The rider drops their body low, leaning hard into the curve, elbows flared as they carve the corner with fierce speed. Cinematic style, wide-angle lens, fast dynamic motion. Sunset orange floods the scene from ahead with long dramatic shadows. The thundering roar of the engine tears through the mountain air, echoing off the cliff walls and filling the soundscape continuously to the end of the clip.

Continuing from the hairpin exit, the rider drops flat over the tank, tucking chin to tank-bag, and blasts down a long straight directly into the detonating golden lens flare of the sunset. The bike howls at redline as they push maximum speed, the road rushing beneath them in a blur. The screaming engine note from the previous clip continues unbroken, sustained at peak revs and completely filling the frame until the last moment of this clip.

Extending from the straight, the racer drives hard up the final steep rise toward the mountain crest. As the bike hits the summit, the rider stands briefly on the footpegs and launches the front wheel into the air, silhouetted against the burning amber sky. The aggressive engine note sustains loud and continuous over the crest, wind rush and tyre roar blending into the open-air soundscape to the final second of the clip.
